ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"other","Summary":"Script to align menus across all HTML pages in the resort project."}
CodeContent:
"import os import re source_dir = "/Users/pravinsam/Desktop/resort/Source" html_files = { "index.html": "home", "about-us.html": "about", "accomodations.html": "accomodations", "premium-accomodations.html": "premium", "dining.html": "dining", "events.html": "events", "gallery.html": "gallery", "contact-us.html": "contact" } def replace_desktop_nav(match, active_item): indent = match.group(1) indent_li = indent + " " indent_a = indent_li + " " home_active = ' active' if active_item == 'home' else '' about_active = ' active' if active_item == 'about' else '' accom_active = ' active' if active_item == 'accomodations' else '' premium_active = ' active' if active_item == 'premium' else '' dining_active = ' active' if active_item == 'dining' else '' events_active = ' active' if active_item == 'events' else '' gallery_active = ' active' if active_item == 'gallery' else '' experience_active = ' active' if active_item == 'experience' else '' contact_active = ' active' if active_item == 'contact' else '' desktop_nav_template = f"""
    {indent_li}
  • {indent_a}Home {indent_li}
    • {indent_li}
  • {indent_a}About Resort {indent_li}
    • {indent_li}
  • {indent_a}Accommodation {indent_li}
    • {indent_li}
  • {indent_a}Premium Accommodation {indent_li}
    • {indent_li}
  • {indent_a}Dining {indent_li}
    • {indent_li}
  • {indent_a}Events {indent_li}
    • {indent_li}
  • {indent_a}
Description: "Create alignment script to systematically update all HTML file menus."
